div.style: font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', Arial, sans-serif; padding: 8px; width: 95mm; min-height: 138mm;

button.name: action_worker_confirm
button.invisible: state != 'manager_confirmed' or transfer_type != 'issue' or not can_worker_confirm

button.name: action_worker_confirm
button.invisible: state != 'manager_confirmed' or transfer_type == 'issue' or not can_worker_confirm

record.field: Брак и потери по сотрудникам и операциям
